signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may impact China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品等对美及全球出口，供应链审查风险上升。

checklist.desc: Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.
Review supply chain for any forced labor allegations; prepare documentation to demonstrate compliance.
Evaluate potential tariff increases under Section 301; adjust pricing and HS classification if needed.
Screen all parties against BIS Entity List and other restricted party lists.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has eased export controls for the UAE, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for UAE-bound shipments.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽了对阿联酋的出口管制，减少了某些物项的许可要求。此变更可能影响对阿联酋出口的美国出口管制和实体清单筛查。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及是否需要出口许可证。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，确保不涉及被禁实体。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保合规。
评估设备HTS编码是否受Section 301附加关税影响，并计算税率。
如设备含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证及供应商FCC ID。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that items are not destined for military end-use or to entities on the Entity List.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明产品不会用于军事最终用途或出口至实体清单上的实体。

checklist.desc: 确认产品ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及许可证要求。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，保留筛查记录。
获取并审核最终用户声明，确保非军事用途。
核对HTS编码，评估是否适用Section 301附加关税。
如涉及无线通信功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports to the US.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响向美国出口某些枪支的许可要求。

checklist.desc: 确认产品是否受BIS管辖，检查ECCN分类，并筛查实体清单和拒绝人员清单。
确定HTS编码，评估是否适用Section 301附加关税，并准备原产地证明。
如果产品含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，获取FCC ID。

checklist.task: 最终用户和最终用途声明
checklist.desc: 获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事用途或受控实体。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This increases the risk of inadvertently exporting to restricted parties. Exporters must screen all parties in the transaction, including affiliates, and ensure compliance with BIS export controls.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。这增加了无意中向受限方出口的风险。出口商必须筛查交易中的所有当事方，包括关联公司，并确保遵守BIS出口管制。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Screen all affiliates of customers and end-users against the Entity List to avoid inadvertent exports to restricted parties.
Obtain and retain end-use and end-user statements for all controlled items, especially semiconductors.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to such facilities, requiring BIS licenses for any shipments. Companies must reassess their supply chains and ensure compliance with updated Entity List and end-use controls.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部堵住了外国在华半导体工厂规避出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对向此类设施出口先进半导体制造设备和技术的限制，要求任何出货均需获得BIS许可证。企业必须重新评估其供应链，确保遵守更新的实体清单和最终用途管制。

checklist.desc: Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Determine if the semiconductor equipment or technology falls under updated BIS controls for foreign-owned fabs in China.
Collect and verify end-use statements and end-user certifications to ensure no diversion to restricted entities.
Audit supply chain to identify any foreign-owned fab in China as ultimate consignee or end-user.
